angle: Practical adoption without replacing the team
hook: AI agents are becoming the new marketing interns.
target_audience: Small business owners and marketing leads
key_points: Use agents for research and first-draft synthesis.
Keep humans responsible for editorial judgment and approval.
Measure workflow time saved before expanding automation.
visual_direction: Clean editorial slides with product UI accents, strong contrast, and minimal decorative elements.
cta: Save this workflow before planning your next campaign.
caption_draft: AI agents can help marketing teams move faster when the workflow stays human-led. Start with repeatable research, keep approvals clear, and scale only after the output is useful.
